MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-22-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Property
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No apperances. The Court adopts its' tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Property IS OFF CALENDAR per the parties' February 14, 2014 and February 18, 2014 letters indicating that they have reached a settlement and that the motion hearing can be taken off calendar. Judge Marla J. Miller, Clerk: B. PAREDES, Not reported (D501)

Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Property
Off Calendar Feb-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Douglas C. MacLellan, Esq., Law Offices of Kaplan & MacLellan, 415.447.8300, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Benjamin Elliot Kaplan, Esq., Law Offices of Kaplan & MacLellan, 415.447.8300, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Charles Redfield, Esq., Low Ball & Lynch, 415.981.6630, appearing for the Defendant.

Matter called. No stipulation to the Judge Pro Tem by Plaintiff. Matter argued. At the conclusion of arguement, Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Property was continued to February 19, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 501. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not reported. =(302/JPT)
